sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section II, List of Answers on Terminology 28:1

items.sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section II, List of Answers on Terminology 28:1
items.html: The more refined part in each vessel is regarded as its externality. It is regarded as the vessel for the surrounding light that shines in it from afar.
